description: A tracked concept or proposal — the primary entry point for new work
An abstract or theoretical construct that underpins multiple ideas
A written specification document defining behaviour, contracts, or requirements
A code artifact, PR, or deployed feature that realises a spec
A running software service or API that the network depends on
A human or AI agent who contributes work to the network
A knowledge domain or bounded namespace that groups related nodes
A single execution of a pipeline stage or workflow
A system event or signal — task-completed, score-changed, etc.
A produced output — test file, doc, report, or generated asset
